raw_text: A vulnerability was determined in Planet ICG-2510 1.0_20250811. The impacted element is the function sub_40C8E4 of the file /usr/sbin/httpd of the component Language Package Configuration Handler. Executing a manipulation of the argument Language can lead to stack-based buffer overflow. The attack can be launched remotely. The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.
